description: The canonical PrepareSaveRequest type in workflows.ts line 47-55 specifies (deps: CaptureDeps) as the dependency parameter. The implementation in prepare-save-request.ts uses a custom PrepareSaveRequestDeps type containing { clockNow, noteIsEmpty, publish } instead of CaptureDeps. CaptureDeps (ports.ts) includes { clockNow, allocateNoteId, clipboardWrite, publish } but does NOT include noteIsEmpty. The implementation needs noteIsEmpty which is absent from CaptureDeps, creating a genuine type-level incompatibility with the canonical workflow signature. Either the canonical type is wrong (noteIsEmpty should be in CaptureDeps or a separate parameter), or the implementation must accept CaptureDeps and source noteIsEmpty differently.
